clusters.title: Artemis II crew breaks distance record, begins moon flyby
clusters.neutral_headline: Artemis II astronauts break distance record

items.title: Artemis II crew breaks distance record, begins moon flyby
items.standfirst: Artemis II astronauts are making history as they travel farther from Earth than any humans in history and conduct a moon flyby.
items.content: Artemis II astronauts are making history as they travel farther from Earth than any humans in history and conduct a moon flyby.

items.title: What to know after Artemis II breaks distance record, prepares for loop around far side of moon
items.standfirst: The Artemis II crew on Monday broke the record for the farthest distance traveled from Earth, a mark previously held by the crew of Apollo 13. CBS News' Bill Harwood and Mark Strassmann reported on the moment and Ambre Rose Trujillo, spokesperson for the Planetary Society, joined CBS News with her reaction.
items.content: The Artemis II crew on Monday broke the record for the farthest distance traveled from Earth, a mark previously held by the crew of Apollo 13. CBS News' Bill Harwood and Mark Strassmann reported on the moment and Ambre Rose Trujillo, spokesperson for the Planetary Society, joined CBS News with her reaction.

items.title: Artemis II crew breaks record for farthest distance traveled from Earth | Special Report
items.standfirst: The four-person crew of the Artemis II made history Monday as they broke the Apollo 13 record for the farthest distance traveled from Earth. Mark Strassmann reported on the feat during a CBS News special report.
items.content: The four-person crew of the Artemis II made history Monday as they broke the Apollo 13 record for the farthest distance traveled from Earth. Mark Strassmann reported on the feat during a CBS News special report.

items.title: Artemis II breaks record for farthest human travel from Earth
items.standfirst: Mission's four astronauts break record set in 1970 by Apollo 13, which flew 400,171km from the planet.
items.content: Mission's four astronauts break record set in 1970 by Apollo 13, which flew 400,171km from the planet.

items.title: Follow live: Artemis II breaks Apollo 13 record for farthest spaceflight from Earth
items.standfirst: Artemis II set a new distance record on Monday, breaking the previous record set by the Apollo 13 mission, for the farthest spaceflight from Earth. During the lunar flyby, which will last for several hours, the Artemis II crew will study specific lunar sites and phenomena as part of a 10-goal plan by NASA.
items.content: Artemis II set a new distance record on Monday, breaking the previous record set by the Apollo 13 mission, for the farthest spaceflight from Earth. During the lunar flyby, which will last for several hours, the Artemis II crew will study specific lunar sites and phenomena as part of a 10-goal plan by NASA.

items.title: NASA Artemis II Crew Break Distance Record for Space Travel
items.standfirst: A NASA crew of four astronauts have now traveled farther in space than anyone in history as the group’s spacecraft hurtles toward the moon for a historic flyby.
items.content: A NASA crew of four astronauts have now traveled farther in space than anyone in history as the group’s spacecraft hurtles toward the moon for a historic flyby.

ai_summary: Artemis II crew breaks distance record from Earth
Astronauts travel farther than any humans in history
Moon flyby conducted by Artemis II crew
Record previously held by Apollo 13 crew
Artemis II crew makes history with distance record

clusters.title: Trump threatens to jail journalist in bid to find source behind report of missing airman in Iran

items.title: Trump threatens to jail journalist in bid to find source behind report of missing airman in Iran
items.standfirst: Trump targets media to find ‘leaker’ who revealed that a US airman was missing after being shot down by Iranian forcesDonald Trump threatened to jail a journalist – or journalists – who reported that a second US airman was missing after being shot down by Iran on Friday in a bid to identify their source.The badly injured airman hid in a mountain crevice to avoid capture before being rescued by a US recovery team that took on heavy fire. The US president announced on Sunday that the service member had been recovered. Continue reading...
items.content: Trump targets media to find ‘leaker’ who revealed that a US airman was missing after being shot down by Iranian forcesDonald Trump threatened to jail a journalist – or journalists – who reported that a second US airman was missing after being shot down by Iran on Friday in a bid to identify their source.The badly injured airman hid in a mountain crevice to avoid capture before being rescued by a US recovery team that took on heavy fire. The US president announced on Sunday that the service member had been recovered. Continue reading...

items.title: Trump threatens to jail journalists in hunt to find leaker of Iran fighter jet story
items.standfirst: President Donald Trump threatened to jail journalists at the media outlet that first reported a second airman was missing following the shoot-down of an American fighter jet in Iran last week
items.content: President Donald Trump threatened to jail journalists at the media outlet that first reported a second airman was missing following the shoot-down of an American fighter jet in Iran last week

items.title: What did Trump threaten about leaked F-15 story? #politics

Speaking about the rescue operation for the U.S. airmen, Trump threatened jail time for…

items.title: Savannah Guthrie returns to Today show for first time since mother’s disappearance
items.standfirst: ‘Here we go, ready or not, let’s do the news,’ Guthrie said, two months after the disappearance of her mother, NancySign up for the Breaking News US email to get newsletter alerts in your inboxToday show co-anchor Savannah Guthrie made an emotional return to the NBC morning show on Monday, 64 days after her mother, Nancy, was believed to be abducted from her home in Tucson, Arizona.“Welcome to Today on this Monday morning. We are so glad you started your week with us, and it’s good to be home,” Guthrie told viewers. Continue reading...

clusters.title: Waitrose under pressure to reinstate worker sacked after stopping shoplifter
clusters.neutral_headline: Waitrose under pressure to reinstate worker

items.title: Waitrose under pressure to reinstate worker sacked after stopping shoplifter
items.standfirst: Retailer faces public outcry over treatment of Walker Smith, who tackled shoplifter stealing Easter eggs at London storeWaitrose is under growing pressure to reinstate an employee of 17 years who was sacked after tackling a shoplifter who was trying to steal Lindt Gold Bunny Easter eggs.The retailer has faced public outcry over its treatment of Walker Smith, who was fired two days after he stopped the shoplifter taking items from the Easter egg display. Continue reading...

Continue reading...

items.title: Tories urge Waitrose to reinstate worker sacked 'after tackling shoplifter'

items.content: The Waitrose employee says he was dismissed from his job after 17 years for trying to stop a theft of Easter eggs.
